title: Glomera leucomela
taxonomy: Glomera leucomela is classified as a type of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Coelogyneae. Glomera leucomela is further divided into the genus Glomera and the section Leucomela. The species Glomera leucomela is native to New Guinea and is known for its unique and striking appearance. This orchid is prized by collectors and enthusiasts for its distinctive flowers and foliage.
uses: Glomera leucomela has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties.
